programme.title: Elephants Up Close
programme.desc: African elephants have an extraordinary ability to find waterholes and communicate with each other.

programme.title: A Lions Life
programme.desc: Having a closer look at the nurturing behaviour of lionesses, highlighting their familial bonds.

programme.title: Survival of the Beast
programme.desc: Investigate the art of nest making with the jungle's master builder: the orangutan.

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: A lion-elephant territory brawl, an ant raid on a termite mound and a honey badger confrontation.

programme.title: A Game Of Leopard Thrones
programme.desc: The leopard characters of South Africa and their fascinating unfolding story once their Queen dies.

programme.title: Texas Gator Savers
programme.desc: Gary, Shannon, Callie, and Damon try to corral a 10-foot alligator in a muddy mess. S01 E03.

programme.title: Epic Animal Encounters
programme.desc: In the slippery rock-lined Sand River, John Varty struggles to save a bull giraffe.

programme.desc: Rainforest Rewild

programme.desc: One Day In Wild Zambia

programme.title: Predator Countdown
programme.desc: A closer look at Australia's arid landscape and the incredible battles between predators and prey.

programme.title: The Hidden World of Snakes
programme.desc: Across Asia and Europe, diverse habitats are home to venomous vipers and iconic cobras.

programme.title: China's Wild Secrets
programme.desc: Giant Panda National Park is three times the size of Yellowstone and is home to over 10,000 species.

programme.title: Tiger Legacy
programme.desc: The crew looks at the challenges mothers of different species face to keep their cubs alive.

programme.title: Wild Dynasties
programme.desc: Growing up in the wild takes fiercely protective parents and luck to ensure survival. S01 E03.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: A focus on forests in Central and South America that are adapted to drought.
